heading: Branches and organizations
label: 103 Branches and organizations
text: The Army National Guard of each State, the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico, the District of Columbia, Guam, and the Virgin Islands includes such members of the staff corps corresponding to the staff corps of the Army as the Secretary of the Army may authorize.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)10332:9.(proviso of 13th par. under “National Guard”), .July 9, 1918, ch. 14340 Stat. 875The word “members” is substituted for the words “officers and enlisted men”. The word “Regular” is omitted, since the organization is now prescribed for the Army, and the Regular Army is only a personnel category.

Amendments2006— substituted “State, the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico, the District of Columbia, Guam, and the Virgin Islands” for “State and Territory, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia”.Pub. L. 109–1631988— struck out “the Canal Zone,” after “Puerto Rico,”.Pub. L. 100–456
